notes: canonical selectable_id policy required; proposal ID remains review-only.
Proposal boundary metadata should not become canonical selectable data.
Workbook source identity belongs in traceability/governance evidence.
Model scope likely belongs to variant/scope relation, not selectable identity alone.
section_family is a broad importer family and is not final section_id.
Orderable RPO is the cleanest direct selectable field.
Ref-only evidence must remain separate from orderable selectable identity.
